backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor defining CommissionEntry and FrontPhoto types, with CRUD operations for commissions and photos stored in Maps, plus a stats query that aggregates transaction totals and average commission rate.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades actor state from OldActor (commissions only) to NewActor by preserving existing commissions and initializing an empty photos Map.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features—Customer Photos Gallery UI and React Query hooks for photos—to their source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend components and hooks.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark modes, including background, foreground, primary, accent, destructive, and chart color variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell with the page title 'PhonePe Commission Tracker', a favicon reference, and a root div that mounts the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing 'dashboard' vs 'photos' view state, rendering AppHeader with navigation props and conditionally displaying CommissionDashboard or CustomerPhotosGallery.
frontend/src/components/AddCommissionFor: Modal dialog form for creating a new commission entry with merchant name, category, amount, rate, and date inputs, real-time commission calculation preview, and submission via useAddCommission mutation.
frontend/src/components/AppFooter.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright year and a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM parameters derived from the current hostname.
frontend/src/components/AppHeader.tsx: Sticky header with PhonePe logo, app title, a tab navigation bar for switching between Dashboard and Customer Photos views, and a Live Tracker badge.
frontend/src/components/CommissionDashbo: Main dashboard component that displays summary stat cards (total transactions, volume, commission earned, avg rate) and a commission table, with Add Entry and Refresh controls.
Sortable table component that renders commission entries with color-coded commission badges and supports per-row deletion via a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/CustomerPhotosGa: Gallery page component that fetches and displays customer photos in a responsive grid, with upload and refresh actions and loading/empty states.
frontend/src/components/DeleteConfirmati: Alert dialog that confirms deletion of a commission entry by transaction ID, showing a loading spinner and toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/components/DeletePhotoDialo: Alert dialog that confirms deletion of a customer photo by photo ID, with pending state handling and toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/PhotoCard.tsx: Card component that renders a single customer photo (converted from Uint8Array to a blob URL) with a hover-reveal delete button and a delete confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/SummaryCard.tsx: Reusable stat card component that displays a title, large value, optional subtitle, and a Lucide icon with configurable color and gradient background.
frontend/src/components/UploadPhotoDialo: A dialog component that allows users to upload a customer photo with a name label, validating inputs and submitting the image on-chain via the `useAddCustomerPhoto` mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook for managing Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via `AuthClient`.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating commissions, stats, and customer photos against the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Inter font, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines light/dark theme CSS custom properties using OKLCH color values for a PhonePe-inspired design system.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider`.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that extends the theme with OKLCH-based semantic color tokens, custom border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes, while enabling typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Defines project metadata including feature list, requirement IDs, known issues, and architectural notes for a PhonePe commission tracking and customer photos gallery app.
